message:
fix(messaging): prevent NATS protocol desync on cancellation

All NATS write methods (publish, publish_request, subscribe,
queue_subscribe, unsubscribe, ping) now set connected=false before
writing to prevent desynced stream reuse if the future is cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
